description: Filter recipes by dietary tag, nutrition, and time.

configuration.query:
FROM nutriq-recipes
| WHERE (?tag IS NULL OR MATCH(tags, ?tag))
| WHERE (?max_calories IS NULL OR nutrition_calories <= ?max_calories)
| WHERE (?min_protein IS NULL OR nutrition_protein_pdv >= ?min_protein)
| WHERE (?max_carbs IS NULL OR nutrition_carbohydrates_pdv <= ?max_carbs)
| WHERE (?max_minutes IS NULL OR minutes <= ?max_minutes)
| SORT nutrition_protein_pdv DESC, minutes ASC
| LIMIT 10
